law.text:
Article 1. Definitions

par. 1. For the purposes of this Act, the following definitions apply:

(1) alien: any person who does not provide proof that they possess Belgian nationality.

(3) third-country national: any person who is not a Union citizen and who is not a person enjoying the Community right of free movement, as defined in Article 2, point 5, of the Schengen Borders Code.

(4) illegal stay: the presence on the territory of an alien who does not or no longer meets the conditions for entry to or stay on the territory.

(11) risk of absconding: the fact that there are reasons to believe that an alien who is the subject of a removal procedure, a procedure for the granting of international protection, or a procedure for determining or transferring to the Member State responsible for examining the application for international protection, will abscond, having regard to the criteria listed in paragraph 2.

(14) identified alien: any alien:
(a) who is in possession of a valid travel document, a valid passport, or a valid identity document; or
(b) who has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country, which has declared itself willing to issue a laissez-passer; or
(c) who falls within the category of nationalities for which the minister may personally issue a laissez-passer.

par. 2. The risk of absconding referred to in paragraph 1, (11), must be current and real. It is established following an individual examination and on the basis of one or more of the following objective criteria, taking into account all circumstances specific to each case:

(1) The person concerned has not submitted a residence application following their illegal entry or during their illegal stay, or has not made their application for international protection within the time limit provided for by this Act.

(2) The person concerned has used false or misleading information or false or falsified documents in the context of a procedure for international protection, residence, removal, or refusal of entry, or has committed fraud or used other unlawful means.

(3) The person concerned does not cooperate or has not cooperated in the context of their dealings with the authorities responsible for the implementation of and/or supervision of compliance with the regulations concerning access to the territory, residence, establishment, and removal of aliens.

(4) The person concerned has made clear that they do not wish to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, one of the following measures:
(a) a transfer, refusal-of-entry, or removal measure;
(b) an entry ban that has neither been lifted nor suspended;
(c) a less coercive measure than a deprivation of liberty measure aimed at guaranteeing their transfer, refusal of entry, or removal, regardless of whether it is a liberty-restricting measure or another measure;
(d) a liberty-restricting measure aimed at guaranteeing public order or national security;
(e) a measure taken by another Member State equivalent to the measures referred to in (a), (b), (c), or (d).

(5) The person concerned is the subject of an entry ban in the Kingdom and/or in another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

(6) The person concerned has, immediately after having been the subject of a decision refusing entry or residence or a decision terminating their stay, or immediately after having been the subject of a refusal-of-entry or removal measure, submitted a new residence application or a new application for international protection.

(7) While being questioned on that point, the person concerned concealed the fact that they had already provided their fingerprints in another State bound by the European regulations concerning the determination of the State responsible for examining an application for international protection, after having submitted an application for international protection.

(8) The person concerned has submitted multiple applications for international protection and/or residence applications in the Kingdom or in one or more other Member States, which have given rise to a negative decision or which have not resulted in the issuance of a residence permit.

(9) While being questioned on that point, the person concerned concealed the fact that they had previously submitted an application for international protection in another State bound by the European regulations concerning the determination of the State responsible for examining an application for international protection.

(10) The person concerned has declared, or it appears from their file, that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an application for international protection or a residence application.

(11) The person concerned is the subject of a fine because they submitted a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

kb_used.fo:
vocabulary V {
  type Person
  type Procedure
  proves_belgian_nationality: Person -> Bool
  is_alien: Person -> Bool
  is_union_citizen: Person -> Bool
  enjoys_community_free_movement_right: Person -> Bool
  is_third_country_national: Person -> Bool
  meets_entry_or_stay_conditions: Person -> Bool
  has_illegal_stay: Person -> Bool
  possesses_valid_travel_document: Person -> Bool
  national_authority_recognised_as_national: Person -> Bool
  falls_within_minister_laissez_passer_nationality_category: Person -> Bool
  is_identified_alien: Person -> Bool
  is_subject_of_removal_or_protection_procedure: Person -> Bool
  reasons_to_believe_will_abscond: Person -> Bool
  risk_established_by_paragraph2_criteria: Person -> Bool
  risk_of_absconding: Person -> Bool
  individual_examination_performed: Person -> Bool
  at_least_one_paragraph2_criterion_met: Person -> Bool
  risk_of_absconding_current_and_real: Person -> Bool
  criterion_2_1_met: Person -> Bool
  no_residence_application_after_illegal_entry_or_stay: Person -> Bool
  no_protection_application_within_time_limit: Person -> Bool
  criterion_2_2_met: Person -> Bool
  used_false_or_misleading_information: Person -> Bool
  used_false_or_falsified_documents: Person -> Bool
  committed_fraud_in_procedure: Person -> Bool
  used_other_unlawful_means: Person -> Bool
  criterion_2_3_met: Person -> Bool
  does_not_cooperate_with_authorities: Person -> Bool
  criterion_2_4_met: Person -> Bool
  declared_unwilling_to_comply_with_transfer_or_removal: Person -> Bool
  failed_to_comply_with_transfer_or_removal: Person -> Bool
  declared_unwilling_to_comply_with_entry_ban: Person -> Bool
  failed_to_comply_with_entry_ban: Person -> Bool
  declared_unwilling_to_comply_with_less_coercive_measure: Person -> Bool
  failed_to_comply_with_less_coercive_measure: Person -> Bool
  declared_unwilling_to_comply_with_liberty_restricting_measure: Person -> Bool
  failed_to_comply_with_liberty_restricting_measure: Person -> Bool
  declared_unwilling_to_comply_with_equivalent_member_state_measure: Person -> Bool
  failed_to_comply_with_equivalent_member_state_measure: Person -> Bool
  criterion_2_5_met: Person -> Bool
  subject_to_entry_ban_in_kingdom: Person -> Bool
  subject_to_entry_ban_in_other_member_state: Person -> Bool
  criterion_2_6_met: Person -> Bool
  new_residence_application_after_refusal_or_termination: Person -> Bool
  new_protection_application_after_refusal_or_termination: Person -> Bool
  new_residence_application_after_removal_measure: Person -> Bool
  new_protection_application_after_removal_measure: Person -> Bool
  criterion_2_7_met: Person -> Bool
  concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_other_state: Person -> Bool
  criterion_2_8_met: Person -> Bool
  submitted_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcome: Person -> Bool
  criterion_2_9_met: Person -> Bool
  concealed_prior_protection_application_in_other_state: Person -> Bool
  criterion_2_10_met: Person -> Bool
  declared_came_for_other_purposes: Person -> Bool
  file_shows_came_for_other_purposes: Person -> Bool
  criterion_2_11_met: Person -> Bool
  subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal: Person -> Bool
}

theory T:V {
  ! p in Person: ((~proves_belgian_nationality(p))) => ((is_alien(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((~is_union_citizen(p)) & (~enjoys_community_free_movement_right(p)))) => ((is_third_country_national(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((is_alien(p)) & (~meets_entry_or_stay_conditions(p)))) => ((has_illegal_stay(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((possesses_valid_travel_document(p))) => ((is_identified_alien(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((national_authority_recognised_as_national(p))) => ((is_identified_alien(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((falls_within_minister_laissez_passer_nationality_category(p))) => ((is_identified_alien(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((reasons_to_believe_will_abscond(p)) & (is_subject_of_removal_or_protection_procedure(p)) & (risk_established_by_paragraph2_criteria(p)))) => ((risk_of_absconding(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((at_least_one_paragraph2_criterion_met(p)) & (individual_examination_performed(p)))) => ((risk_established_by_paragraph2_criteria(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((risk_of_absconding(p)) & (individual_examination_performed(p)) & (at_least_one_paragraph2_criterion_met(p)))) => ((risk_of_absconding_current_and_real(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((no_residence_application_after_illegal_entry_or_stay(p))) => ((criterion_2_1_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((no_protection_application_within_time_limit(p))) => ((criterion_2_1_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((used_false_or_misleading_information(p))) => ((criterion_2_2_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((used_false_or_falsified_documents(p))) => ((criterion_2_2_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((committed_fraud_in_procedure(p))) => ((criterion_2_2_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((used_other_unlawful_means(p))) => ((criterion_2_2_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((does_not_cooperate_with_authorities(p))) => ((criterion_2_3_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((declared_unwilling_to_comply_with_transfer_or_removal(p))) => ((criterion_2_4_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((failed_to_comply_with_transfer_or_removal(p))) => ((criterion_2_4_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((declared_unwilling_to_comply_with_entry_ban(p))) => ((criterion_2_4_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((failed_to_comply_with_entry_ban(p))) => ((criterion_2_4_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((declared_unwilling_to_comply_with_less_coercive_measure(p))) => ((criterion_2_4_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((failed_to_comply_with_less_coercive_measure(p))) => ((criterion_2_4_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((declared_unwilling_to_comply_with_liberty_restricting_measure(p))) => ((criterion_2_4_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((failed_to_comply_with_liberty_restricting_measure(p))) => ((criterion_2_4_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((declared_unwilling_to_comply_with_equivalent_member_state_measure(p))) => ((criterion_2_4_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((failed_to_comply_with_equivalent_member_state_measure(p))) => ((criterion_2_4_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((subject_to_entry_ban_in_kingdom(p))) => ((criterion_2_5_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((subject_to_entry_ban_in_other_member_state(p))) => ((criterion_2_5_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((new_residence_application_after_refusal_or_termination(p))) => ((criterion_2_6_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((new_protection_application_after_refusal_or_termination(p))) => ((criterion_2_6_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((new_residence_application_after_removal_measure(p))) => ((criterion_2_6_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((new_protection_application_after_removal_measure(p))) => ((criterion_2_6_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_other_state(p))) => ((criterion_2_7_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((submitted_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcome(p))) => ((criterion_2_8_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((concealed_prior_protection_application_in_other_state(p))) => ((criterion_2_9_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((declared_came_for_other_purposes(p))) => ((criterion_2_10_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((file_shows_came_for_other_purposes(p))) => ((criterion_2_10_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal(p))) => ((criterion_2_11_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((criterion_2_1_met(p)) | ((criterion_2_2_met(p)) | ((criterion_2_3_met(p)) | ((criterion_2_4_met(p)) | ((criterion_2_5_met(p)) | ((criterion_2_6_met(p)) | ((criterion_2_7_met(p)) | ((criterion_2_8_met(p)) | ((criterion_2_9_met(p)) | ((criterion_2_10_met(p)) | (criterion_2_11_met(p))))))))))))) => ((at_least_one_paragraph2_criterion_met(p))).
}

case.text: Dana is a foreign national and is the subject of a removal procedure. In her residence application she used false documents.

questions.text: Can this be an objective criterion for risk of absconding pursuant to Article 1, paragraph 2, point 2?

expected.reason: Risk of absconding can be established using one or more objective criteria; use of false documents in a residence/removal procedure is listed as criterion 2.

proves_belgian_nationality.name: proves_belgian_nationality
proves_belgian_nationality.description: The person provides proof that they possess Belgian nationality.

is_alien.name: is_alien
is_alien.description: The person is an alien because they do not prove Belgian nationality.

is_union_citizen.name: is_union_citizen
is_union_citizen.description: The person is a Union citizen (background status directly assertable from case facts).

enjoys_community_free_movement_right.name: enjoys_community_free_movement_right
enjoys_community_free_movement_right.description: The person enjoys the Community right of free movement as defined in Article 2(5) of the Schengen Borders Code.

is_third_country_national.name: is_third_country_national
is_third_country_national.description: The person is a third-country national: not a Union citizen and not enjoying Community free movement rights.

meets_entry_or_stay_conditions.name: meets_entry_or_stay_conditions
meets_entry_or_stay_conditions.description: The person meets the conditions for entry to or stay on the territory.

has_illegal_stay.name: has_illegal_stay
has_illegal_stay.description: The person's stay is illegal: they are an alien who does not or no longer meets entry or stay conditions.

possesses_valid_travel_document.name: possesses_valid_travel_document
possesses_valid_travel_document.description: The person is in possession of a valid travel document, passport, or identity document.

national_authority_recognised_as_nationa.name: national_authority_recognised_as_national
national_authority_recognised_as_nationa.description: The national authority of the person's country has recognised the person as a national and declared willingness to issue a laissez-passer.

falls_within_minister_laissez_passer_nat.name: falls_within_minister_laissez_passer_nationality_category
falls_within_minister_laissez_passer_nat.description: The person falls within the category of nationalities for which the minister may personally issue a laissez-passer.

is_identified_alien.name: is_identified_alien
is_identified_alien.description: The person is an identified alien based on one of the three identification grounds.

is_subject_of_removal_or_protection_proc.name: is_subject_of_removal_or_protection_procedure
is_subject_of_removal_or_protection_proc.description: The person is the subject of a removal procedure, a procedure for granting international protection, or a procedure for determining or transferring to the responsible Member State.

reasons_to_believe_will_abscond.name: reasons_to_believe_will_abscond
reasons_to_believe_will_abscond.description: There are reasons to believe that the alien will abscond.

risk_established_by_paragraph2_criteria.name: risk_established_by_paragraph2_criteria
risk_established_by_paragraph2_criteria.description: The risk of absconding is established having regard to the criteria listed in paragraph 2.

risk_of_absconding.name: risk_of_absconding
risk_of_absconding.description: A risk of absconding exists for the alien.

individual_examination_performed.name: individual_examination_performed
individual_examination_performed.description: The risk of absconding was established following an individual examination.

at_least_one_paragraph2_criterion_met.name: at_least_one_paragraph2_criterion_met
at_least_one_paragraph2_criterion_met.description: At least one objective criterion from paragraph 2 is met for the person.

risk_of_absconding_current_and_real.name: risk_of_absconding_current_and_real
risk_of_absconding_current_and_real.description: The risk of absconding is current and real, established by individual examination and at least one objective criterion from paragraph 2.

criterion_2_1_met.name: criterion_2_1_met
criterion_2_1_met.description: The objective criterion in paragraph 2(1) is met: no residence application after illegal entry or during illegal stay, or no international protection application within the time limit.

no_residence_application_after_illegal_e.name: no_residence_application_after_illegal_entry_or_stay
no_residence_application_after_illegal_e.description: The person has not submitted a residence application following their illegal entry or during their illegal stay.

no_protection_application_within_time_li.name: no_protection_application_within_time_limit
no_protection_application_within_time_li.description: The person has not made their application for international protection within the time limit provided for by the Act.

criterion_2_2_met.name: criterion_2_2_met
criterion_2_2_met.description: The objective criterion in paragraph 2(2) is met: use of false information, false documents, fraud, or other unlawful means in a relevant procedure.

used_false_or_misleading_information.name: used_false_or_misleading_information
used_false_or_misleading_information.description: The person has used false or misleading information in the context of a procedure for international protection, residence, removal, or refusal of entry.

used_false_or_falsified_documents.name: used_false_or_falsified_documents
used_false_or_falsified_documents.description: The person has used false or falsified documents in the context of a relevant procedure.

committed_fraud_in_procedure.name: committed_fraud_in_procedure
committed_fraud_in_procedure.description: The person has committed fraud in the context of a relevant procedure.

used_other_unlawful_means.name: used_other_unlawful_means
used_other_unlawful_means.description: The person has used other unlawful means in the context of a relevant procedure.

criterion_2_3_met.name: criterion_2_3_met
criterion_2_3_met.description: The objective criterion in paragraph 2(3) is met: non-cooperation with authorities responsible for access, residence, establishment, and removal.

does_not_cooperate_with_authorities.name: does_not_cooperate_with_authorities
does_not_cooperate_with_authorities.description: The person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with the authorities responsible for implementation of or supervision of compliance with regulations concerning access, residence, establishment, and removal of aliens.

criterion_2_4_met.name: criterion_2_4_met
criterion_2_4_met.description: The objective criterion in paragraph 2(4) is met: declared unwillingness or prior failure to comply with a transfer, removal, entry ban, less coercive, liberty-restricting, or equivalent Member State measure.

declared_unwilling_to_comply_with_transf.name: declared_unwilling_to_comply_with_transfer_or_removal
declared_unwilling_to_comply_with_transf.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with a transfer, refusal-of-entry, or removal measure.

failed_to_comply_with_transfer_or_remova.name: failed_to_comply_with_transfer_or_removal
failed_to_comply_with_transfer_or_remova.description: The person has already failed to comply with a transfer, refusal-of-entry, or removal measure.

declared_unwilling_to_comply_with_entry_.name: declared_unwilling_to_comply_with_entry_ban
declared_unwilling_to_comply_with_entry_.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with an entry ban that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

failed_to_comply_with_entry_ban.name: failed_to_comply_with_entry_ban
failed_to_comply_with_entry_ban.description: The person has already failed to comply with an entry ban that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

declared_unwilling_to_comply_with_less_c.name: declared_unwilling_to_comply_with_less_coercive_measure
declared_unwilling_to_comply_with_less_c.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with a less coercive measure than deprivation of liberty aimed at guaranteeing transfer, refusal of entry, or removal.

failed_to_comply_with_less_coercive_meas.name: failed_to_comply_with_less_coercive_measure
failed_to_comply_with_less_coercive_meas.description: The person has already failed to comply with a less coercive measure than deprivation of liberty aimed at guaranteeing transfer, refusal of entry, or removal.

declared_unwilling_to_comply_with_libert.name: declared_unwilling_to_comply_with_liberty_restricting_measure
declared_unwilling_to_comply_with_libert.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with a liberty-restricting measure aimed at guaranteeing public order or national security.

failed_to_comply_with_liberty_restrictin.name: failed_to_comply_with_liberty_restricting_measure
failed_to_comply_with_liberty_restrictin.description: The person has already failed to comply with a liberty-restricting measure aimed at guaranteeing public order or national security.

declared_unwilling_to_comply_with_equiva.name: declared_unwilling_to_comply_with_equivalent_member_state_measure
declared_unwilling_to_comply_with_equiva.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with a measure taken by another Member State equivalent to a transfer, removal, entry ban, less coercive, or liberty-restricting measure.

failed_to_comply_with_equivalent_member_.name: failed_to_comply_with_equivalent_member_state_measure
failed_to_comply_with_equivalent_member_.description: The person has already failed to comply with a measure taken by another Member State equivalent to a transfer, removal, entry ban, less coercive, or liberty-restricting measure.

criterion_2_5_met.name: criterion_2_5_met
criterion_2_5_met.description: The objective criterion in paragraph 2(5) is met: the person is subject to an active entry ban in the Kingdom or another Member State.

subject_to_entry_ban_in_kingdom.name: subject_to_entry_ban_in_kingdom
subject_to_entry_ban_in_kingdom.description: The person is the subject of an entry ban in the Kingdom that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

subject_to_entry_ban_in_other_member_sta.name: subject_to_entry_ban_in_other_member_state
subject_to_entry_ban_in_other_member_sta.description: The person is the subject of an entry ban in another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

criterion_2_6_met.name: criterion_2_6_met
criterion_2_6_met.description: The objective criterion in paragraph 2(6) is met: new residence or protection application submitted immediately after a refusal, termination, or removal decision.

new_residence_application_after_refusal_.name: new_residence_application_after_refusal_or_termination
new_residence_application_after_refusal_.description: The person has submitted a new residence application immediately after a decision refusing entry or residence or terminating their stay.

new_protection_application_after_refusal.name: new_protection_application_after_refusal_or_termination
new_protection_application_after_refusal.description: The person has submitted a new application for international protection immediately after a decision refusing entry or residence or terminating their stay.

new_residence_application_after_removal_.name: new_residence_application_after_removal_measure
new_residence_application_after_removal_.description: The person has submitted a new residence application immediately after a refusal-of-entry or removal measure.

new_protection_application_after_removal.name: new_protection_application_after_removal_measure
new_protection_application_after_removal.description: The person has submitted a new application for international protection immediately after a refusal-of-entry or removal measure.

criterion_2_7_met.name: criterion_2_7_met
criterion_2_7_met.description: The objective criterion in paragraph 2(7) is met: the person concealed having provided fingerprints in another Dublin-bound State after submitting a protection application.

concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_other_st.name: concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_other_state
concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_other_st.description: The person, while being questioned, concealed that they had already provided fingerprints in another State bound by European regulations on determining the responsible State for examining a protection application.

criterion_2_8_met.name: criterion_2_8_met
criterion_2_8_met.description: The objective criterion in paragraph 2(8) is met: multiple protection or residence applications in the Kingdom or other Member States resulting in negative decisions or no residence permit.

submitted_multiple_applications_with_neg.name: submitted_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcome
submitted_multiple_applications_with_neg.description: The person has submitted multiple applications for international protection or residence in the Kingdom or other Member States, resulting in negative decisions or no residence permit.

criterion_2_9_met.name: criterion_2_9_met
criterion_2_9_met.description: The objective criterion in paragraph 2(9) is met: the person concealed having previously submitted a protection application in another Dublin-bound State.

concealed_prior_protection_application_i.name: concealed_prior_protection_application_in_other_state
concealed_prior_protection_application_i.description: The person, while being questioned, concealed that they had previously submitted an application for international protection in another State bound by European regulations on determining the responsible State.

criterion_2_10_met.name: criterion_2_10_met
criterion_2_10_met.description: The objective criterion in paragraph 2(10) is met: the person declared or it appears from their file that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted a protection or residence application.

declared_came_for_other_purposes.name: declared_came_for_other_purposes
declared_came_for_other_purposes.description: The person has declared that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted a protection or residence application.

file_shows_came_for_other_purposes.name: file_shows_came_for_other_purposes
file_shows_came_for_other_purposes.description: It appears from the person's file that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted a protection or residence application.

criterion_2_11_met.name: criterion_2_11_met
criterion_2_11_met.description: The objective criterion in paragraph 2(11) is met: the person is subject to a fine for submitting a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_.name: subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal
subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_.description: The person is the subject of a fine because they submitted a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

routing.question: Can this be an objective criterion for risk of absconding pursuant to Article 1, paragraph 2, point 2?

deduction.extraction_repair_hint: The selected legal conclusion could not be proven because an observable antecedent required by the KB rule was not asserted from the case. Re-check the case text for facts matching these observable schema symbols: reasons_to_believe_will_abscond: There are reasons to believe that the alien will abscond..

Re-check the case text for facts matching these observable schema symbols: reasons_to_believe_will_abscond: There are reasons to believe that the alien will abscond..

symbolic_intent_routing.question: Can this be an objective criterion for risk of absconding pursuant to Article 1, paragraph 2, point 2?

pipeline.natural_language: Cannot determine with certainty. risk_of_absconding(dana) is not logically forced either way (label: unknown).
